hyperparameters.name: disable-inlining
hyperparameters.description: Do not run the inliner pass

hyperparameters.name: max-memory-inhibit
hyperparameters.description: Inhibit forking at memory cap (vs. random terminate)

hyperparameters.name: klee-call-optimisation
hyperparameters.description: Allow optimization of functions that contain KLEE calls

hyperparameters.name: use-construct-hash-stp
hyperparameters.description: Use hash-consing during STP query construction

hyperparameters.name: use-visitor-hash
hyperparameters.description: Use hash-consing during expression visitation

hyperparameters.name: equality-substitution
hyperparameters.description: Simplify equality expressions before querying the solver

hyperparameters.name: check-overshift
hyperparameters.description: Inject checks for overshift

hyperparameters.name: check-div-zero
hyperparameters.description: Inject checks for division-by-zero

hyperparameters.name: use-branch-cache
hyperparameters.description: Use the branch cache

hyperparameters.name: use-independent-solver
hyperparameters.description: Use constraint independence

hyperparameters.name: use-call-paths
hyperparameters.description: Enable calltree tracking for instruction level statistics

hyperparameters.name: use-cex-cache
hyperparameters.description: Use the counterexample cache

hyperparameters.name: use-forked-solver
hyperparameters.description: Run the core SMT solver in a forked process

hyperparameters.name: watchdog
hyperparameters.description: Use a watchdog process to enforce --max-time.

hyperparameters.name: const-array-opt
hyperparameters.description: Enable an optimization involving all-constant arrays

hyperparameters.name: zero-seed-extension
hyperparameters.description: Use zero-filled objects if matching seed not found

hyperparameters.name: warnings-only-to-file
hyperparameters.description: All warnings will be written to warnings.txt only. If disabled, they are also written on screen.

hyperparameters.name: smtlib-human-readable
hyperparameters.description: Enables generated SMT-LIBv2 files to be human readable

hyperparameters.name: warn-all-external-symbols
hyperparameters.description: Issue a warning on startup for all external symbols

hyperparameters.name: use-iterative-deepening-time-search
hyperparameters.description: Use iterative deepening time search (experimental)

hyperparameters.name: cex-cache-exp
hyperparameters.description: Optimization for validity queries

hyperparameters.name: all-external-warnings
hyperparameters.description: Issue a warning everytime an external call is made, as opposed to once per function

hyperparameters.name: readable-posix-inputs
hyperparameters.description: Prefer creation of POSIX inputs (command-line arguments, files, etc.) with human readable bytes. Note: option is expensive when creating lots of tests

hyperparameters.name: return-null-on-zero-malloc
hyperparameters.description: Returns NULL if malloc(0) is called

hyperparameters.name: emit-all-errors
hyperparameters.description: Generate tests cases for all errors

hyperparameters.name: solver-optimize-divides
hyperparameters.description: Optimize constant divides into add/shift/multiplies before passing them to the core SMT solver

hyperparameters.name: cex-cache-try-all
hyperparameters.description: Try substituting all counterexamples before asking the SMT solver

hyperparameters.name: simplify-sym-indices
hyperparameters.description: Simplify symbolic accesses using equalities from other constraints

hyperparameters.name: named-seed-matching
hyperparameters.description: Use names to match symbolic objects to inputs

hyperparameters.name: disable-verify
hyperparameters.description: Do not verify the module integrity

hyperparameters.name: track-instruction-time
hyperparameters.description: Enable tracking of time for individual instructions

hyperparameters.name: silent-klee-assume
hyperparameters.description: Silently terminate paths with an infeasible condition given to klee_assume() rather than emitting an error

hyperparameters.name: suppress-external-warnings
hyperparameters.description: Supress warnings about calling external functions.

hyperparameters.name: cex-cache-superset
hyperparameters.description: Try substituting SAT superset counterexample before asking the SMT solver

hyperparameters.name: verify-each
hyperparameters.description: Verify intermediate results of all optimization passes

hyperparameters.name: max-memory
hyperparameters.description: Refuse to fork when above this amount of memory (in MB)

hyperparameters.name: max-stack-frames
hyperparameters.description: Terminate a state after this many stack frames. Set to 0 to disable

hyperparameters.name: max-forks
hyperparameters.description: Only fork this many times. Set to -1 to disable

hyperparameters.name: max-sym-array-size
hyperparameters.description: If a symbolic array exceeds this size (in bytes), symbolic addresses into this array are concretized. Set to 0 to disable

hyperparameters.name: max-depth
hyperparameters.description: Only allow this many symbolic branches. Set to 0 to disable

hyperparameters.name: batch-instructions
hyperparameters.description: Number of instructions to batch when using --use-batching-search.  Set to 0 to disable

hyperparameters.name: redzone-size
hyperparameters.description: Set the size of the redzones to be added after each allocation (in bytes). This is important to detect out-of-bounds accesses

hyperparameters.name: seed-time
hyperparameters.description: Amount of time to dedicate to seeds, before normal search

hyperparameters.name: max-solver-time
hyperparameters.description: Maximum amount of time for a single SMT query (default=0s (off)). Enables --use-forked-solver

hyperparameters.name: batch-time
hyperparameters.description: Amount of time to batch when using --use-batching-search.

hyperparameters.name: uncovered-update-interval
hyperparameters.description: Update interval for uncovered instructions

hyperparameters.name: max-static-fork-pct
hyperparameters.description: Maximum percentage spent by an instruction forking out of the forking of all instructions

hyperparameters.name: max-static-solve-pct
hyperparameters.description: Maximum percentage of solving time that can be spent by a single instruction over total solving time for all instructions

hyperparameters.name: max-static-cpfork-pct
hyperparameters.description: Maximum percentage spent by an instruction of a call path forking out of the forking of all instructions in the call path

hyperparameters.name: max-static-cpsolve-pct
hyperparameters.description: Maximum percentage of solving time that can be spent by a single instruction of a call path over total solving time for all instructions

hyperparameters.name: array-value-symb-ratio
hyperparameters.description: Maximum ratio of symbolic values to array size for which the mixed value-based transformations are applied.

hyperparameters.name: array-value-ratio
hyperparameters.description: Maximum ratio of unique values to array size for which the value-based transformations are applied.

hyperparameters.name: search
hyperparameters.description: Specify the search heuristic

hyperparameters.name: switch-type
hyperparameters.description: Select the implementation of switch

hyperparameters.name: smtlib-display-constants
hyperparameters.description: Sets how bitvector constants are written in generated SMT-LIBv2 files

hyperparameters.name: smtlib-abbreviation-mode
hyperparameters.description: Choose abbreviation mode to use in SMT-LIBv2 files

hyperparameters.name: seed-file
hyperparameters.description: .ktest file to be used as seed

hyperparameters.name: sym-arg
hyperparameters.description: Replace by a symbolic argument with length N.

hyperparameters.name: sym-stdin
hyperparameters.description: Make stdin symbolic with size N.

hyperparameters.name: sym-files-1
hyperparameters.description: Make NUM symbolic files (‘A’, ‘B’, ‘C’, etc.)

hyperparameters.name: sym-files-2
hyperparameters.description: each with size N (excluding stdin)
